simple_types.name: Sample_Bit_Size
simple_types.code:
type Sample_Bit_Size is mod 2 ** 8 with
  Convention => C;

simple_types.name: Sample_Endianness
simple_types.code:
type Sample_Endianness is (Little_Endian, Big_Endian) with
  Convention => C;

record_types.name: Sample_Format

constants.name: Sample_Format_F32LSB
constants.code:
Sample_Format_F32LSB : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 32,
   Float      => True,
   Endianness => Little_Endian,
   Signed     => True);

constants.name: Sample_Format_F32MSB
constants.code:
Sample_Format_F32MSB : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 32,
   Float      => True,
   Endianness => Big_Endian,
   Signed     => True);

constants.name: Sample_Format_S16LSB
constants.code:
Sample_Format_S16LSB : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 16,
   Float      => False,
   Endianness => Little_Endian,
   Signed     => True);

constants.name: Sample_Format_S16MSB
constants.code:
Sample_Format_S16MSB : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 16,
   Float      => False,
   Endianness => Big_Endian,
   Signed     => True);

constants.name: Sample_Format_S16SYS
constants.code:
Sample_Format_S16SYS : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 16,
   Float      => False,
   Endianness => System_Endianness,
   Signed     => True);

constants.name: Sample_Format_S32LSB
constants.code:
Sample_Format_S32LSB : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 32,
   Float      => False,
   Endianness => Little_Endian,
   Signed     => False);

constants.name: Sample_Format_S32MSB
constants.code:
Sample_Format_S32MSB : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 32,
   Float      => False,
   Endianness => Big_Endian,
   Signed     => True);

constants.name: Sample_Format_S32SYS
constants.code:
Sample_Format_S32SYS : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 32,
   Float      => False,
   Endianness => System_Endianness,
   Signed     => True);

constants.name: Sample_Format_S8
constants.code:
Sample_Format_S8 : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 8,
   Float      => False,
   Endianness => Little_Endian,
   Signed     => True);

constants.name: Sample_Format_U16LSB
constants.code:
Sample_Format_U16LSB : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 16,
   Float      => False,
   Endianness => Little_Endian,
   Signed     => False);

constants.name: Sample_Format_U16MSB
constants.code:
Sample_Format_U16MSB : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 16,
   Float      => False,
   Endianness => Big_Endian,
   Signed     => False);

constants.name: Sample_Format_U16SYS
constants.code:
Sample_Format_U16SYS : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 16,
   Float      => False,
   Endianness => System_Endianness,
   Signed     => False);

constants.name: Sample_Format_U32SYS
constants.code:
Sample_Format_U32SYS : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 32,
   Float      => False,
   Endianness => System_Endianness,

constants.name: Sample_Format_U8
constants.code:
Sample_Format_U8 : constant Sample_Format :=
  (Bit_Size   => 8,
   Float      => False,
   Endianness => Little_Endian,
   Signed     => False);

constants.name: System_Endianness
constants.code:
System_Endianness : constant Sample_Endianness :=
  (if System.Default_Bit_Order = System.High_Order_First
   then Big_Endian
   else Little_Endian);
